stemHtml:
A flight from New York JFK is preparing for taxi. Given the following information, what should the pilots do?

  • Runway 31L: due to works, only 11 000 ft of the runway are available, but is currently only used for landings.

  • Runway 31R: 10 000 ft available and is used for departures with noise abatement procedures in force. However, it is too short according to the aircraft's current TOM calculations.

  • Runway 04L: not available, it is currently used for landing only.

  • Runway 04R: not in use.

Wind: 230°/15 kt

options.b: Wait until ATC changes runways from 31R to 31L.
options.c: Make a request for runway 31L for safety reasons.
options.d: Offload one container of cargo so that the aircraft is able to take off from runway 31R.
